checks.name: target-repo-webhook-configured
checks.command: gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/hooks --jq '[.[] | select(.config.url | contains("5dlabs") or contains("pm-"))] | length > 0'
checks.description: Target repo has webhook configured for Linear sync

checks.name: linear-webhook-configured
checks.description: PM Server has Linear webhook configured

global: kubectl delete pvc -n cto -l app=alerthub --wait=false 2>/dev/null || true
kubectl delete pvc -n cto workspace-prd-alerthub-e2e-test-morgan --wait=false 2>/dev/null || true

phases.description: PRD → Tasks generation via Morgan agent
phases.objective: Submit intake for AlertHub and verify tasks.json is generated with testStrategy for each task.

gates.name: intake-coderun-created
gates.description: Intake CodeRun exists and is processing
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "intake")] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-sidecar-running
gates.description: Linear sync sidecar container is running for CLI output streaming
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -l workflow-type=intake -o json | jq -e '.items[0].spec.containers | map(select(.name == "linear-sidecar" or .name == "linear-sync")) | length > 0'

gates.name: intake-succeeded
gates.description: Intake CodeRun completed successfully
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "intake") | .status.phase == "Succeeded"'

gates.name: linear-issues-created
gates.description: Linear issues created for each task in the project
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/project/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/issues | jq -e '.issues | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-issues-have-subtasks
gates.description: Linear issues have subtasks populated from task breakdown
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/project/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/issues | jq -e '.issues | map(select(.children | length > 0)) | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-activities-posted
gates.description: Agent activities visible in Linear issue timeline (rich CLI output)
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/project/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/activities | jq -e '.activities | length > 0'

gates.name: tasks-json-exists
gates.description: tasks.json created in repository
gates.command: gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --silent

gates.name: tasks-have-test-strategy
gates.description: All tasks have testStrategy field
gates.command: gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -e '.tasks | all(.testStrategy != null and .testStrategy != "")'

gates.name: task-docs-created
gates.description: Task documentation files exist
gates.command: gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/docs --silent | jq -e 'length > 0'

gates.name: cto-config-attached-to-issue
gates.description: CTO config is attached to Linear intake issue
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/project/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/config | jq -e '.config != null and .config.agents != null'

gates.name: cto-config-configmap-exists
gates.description: CTO config ConfigMap exists in cluster namespace
gates.command: kubectl get configmap -n cto cto-config-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -e '.data["cto-config.json"] != null'

gates.name: cto-config-sync-test
gates.description: Updates to CTO config in Linear sync to cluster ConfigMap
gates.command: BEFORE=$(kubectl get configmap -n cto cto-config-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -r '.metadata.resourceVersion'); curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:8081/api/linear/test-config-sync -d '{"project":"prd-alerthub-e2e-test","agent":"blaze","addTool":"context7"}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json'; sleep 10; AFTER=$(kubectl get configmap -n cto cto-config-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -r '.metadata.resourceVersion'); echo "Before: $BEFORE, After: $AFTER"; [ "$BEFORE" != "$AFTER" ]

gates.name: auto-append-deploy-enabled
gates.description: autoAppendDeployTask is enabled in config
gates.command: cat ${ROOT_DIR}/cto-config.json | jq -e '.defaults.intake.autoAppendDeployTask == true' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Config check - may not be enabled'

gates.name: deploy-task-appended
gates.description: Final task is a Bolt deploy task with all dependencies
gates.command: gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -e '.tasks[-1].agent_hint == "bolt" and (.tasks[-1].title | test("deploy|Deploy"; "i"))'

gates.name: tool-filter-verified
gates.description: Agent logs show only Linear-configured tools are available
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l workflow-type=intake --tail=200 | grep -iE 'declared tools|Tool inventory|tools resolved|All declared tools'

phases.description: Task implementation by assigned agent (triggered via webhook from PR merge)
phases.objective: Verify Play is triggered via webhook (not MCP), uses CTO config from Linear, and creates task CodeRun with correct agent.

gates.name: intake-pr-merged
gates.description: Intake PR was merged (triggers play via webhook)
gates.command: gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state merged --json number,title --jq '[.[] | select(.title | contains("intake") or contains("tasks"))] | length > 0'

gates.name: webhook-received-for-merge
gates.description: PM Server received webhook for PR merge event
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/webhooks/recent | jq -e '[.events[] | select(.type == "pull_request" and .action == "closed" and .merged == true)] | length > 0'

gates.name: play-triggered-via-webhook
gates.description: Play workflow was triggered by webhook, not direct MCP call
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code") | .metadata.annotations["cto.5dlabs.io/trigger-source"]] | any(. == "webhook" or . == "pm-server")'

gates.name: cto-config-from-linear
gates.description: CTO config is sourced from Linear issue attachment, not local file
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code") | .metadata.annotations["cto.5dlabs.io/config-source"]] | any(. == "linear" or . == "linear-attachment")'

gates.name: play-coderun-created
gates.description: Play CodeRun exists for task
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code")] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-sidecar-running
gates.description: Linear sync sidecar container is running for CLI output streaming
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.spec.containers | map(select(.name == "linear-sidecar" or .name == "linear-sync")) | length > 0)] | length > 0'

gates.name: correct-agent-assigned
gates.description: CodeRun assigned to correct agent based on task agent_hint
gates.command: EXPECTED_AGENT=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].agent_hint'); ACTUAL_AGENT=$(kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -r '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code")][0].metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/agent-type"]'); echo "Expected: $EXPECTED_AGENT, Actual: $ACTUAL_AGENT"; [ "$EXPECTED_AGENT" = "$ACTUAL_AGENT" ]

gates.name: agent-prompt-mounted
gates.description: Agent-specific system prompt is mounted from ConfigMap
gates.command: AGENT=$(kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -r '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code")][0].metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/agent-type"]'); kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e --arg agent "$AGENT" '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/run-type"] == "code") | .spec.volumes[] | select(.configMap.name | contains($agent) or contains("prompt"))] | length > 0'

gates.name: agent-skills-configured
gates.description: Agent has correct skills based on profile (language-specific best practices)
gates.command: AGENT=$(kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -r '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code")][0].metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/agent-type"]'); curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/agents/$AGENT/profile | jq -e '.skills | length > 0'

gates.name: agent-tools-match-profile
gates.description: Agent MCP tools match profile definition (context7, firecrawl, etc.)
gates.command: AGENT=$(kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -r '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code")][0].metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/agent-type"]'); PROFILE_TOOLS=$(curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/agents/$AGENT/profile | jq -r '.tools | sort | join(",")'); POD_TOOLS=$(kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -r '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/run-type"] == "code")][0].spec.containers[0].env[] | select(.name == "MCP_TOOLS" or .name == "AGENT_TOOLS") | .value' | tr ',' '\n' | sort | tr '\n' ','); echo "Profile: $PROFILE_TOOLS, Pod: $POD_TOOLS"; [[ "$POD_TOOLS" == *"$PROFILE_TOOLS"* ]] || [ -n "$PROFILE_TOOLS" ]

gates.name: agent-language-correct
gates.description: Agent's primary language matches task requirements
gates.command: EXPECTED_LANG=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].language // .tasks[0].stack // "any"'); AGENT=$(kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -r '[.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code")][0].metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/agent-type"]'); curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/agents/$AGENT/profile | jq -e --arg lang "$EXPECTED_LANG" '.languages | map(ascii_downcase) | any(. == ($lang | ascii_downcase)) or $lang == "any"'

gates.name: linear-agent-assigned-to-issue
gates.description: Correct agent app is assigned/delegated on Linear issue
gates.command: EXPECTED_AGENT=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].agent_hint'); curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current | jq -e --arg agent "$EXPECTED_AGENT" '.assignee.name | ascii_downcase | contains($agent)'

gates.name: linear-agent-session-active
gates.description: Linear Agent API session is active with real-time dialog UI
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/session | jq -e '.session.status == "active" and .session.dialogEnabled == true'

gates.name: linear-agent-input-available
gates.description: Agent can receive input/signals through Linear Agent UI
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/session | jq -e '.session.inputEnabled == true'

gates.name: implementation-succeeded
gates.description: Implementation CodeRun completed successfully
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '.items[] | select(.spec.runType == "code") | .status.phase == "Succeeded"'

gates.name: linear-activities-posted
gates.description: Agent activities visible in Linear issue timeline (rich CLI output)
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/activities | jq -e '.activities | length > 0'

gates.name: pr-created
gates.description: PR created in repository
gates.command: gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state open --json number --jq 'length > 0'

gates.name: pr-author-correct
gates.description: PR created by correct agent's GitHub App
gates.command: EXPECTED_AGENT=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].agent_hint'); PR_AUTHOR=$(gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state all --json author --jq '.[0].author.login'); echo "Expected agent: $EXPECTED_AGENT, PR author: $PR_AUTHOR"; [[ "$PR_AUTHOR" == *"$EXPECTED_AGENT"* ]] || [[ "$PR_AUTHOR" == "app/${EXPECTED_AGENT}-5dlabs" ]]

gates.name: linear-sync-update-test
gates.description: Updates in Linear trigger push to feature branch (bidirectional sync)
gates.command: BRANCH=$(gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state open --json headRefName --jq '.[0].headRefName'); BEFORE_SHA=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/commits?sha=$BRANCH --jq '.[0].sha'); curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:8081/api/linear/test-sync -d '{"project":"prd-alerthub-e2e-test","action":"update_docs"}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json'; sleep 15; AFTER_SHA=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/commits?sha=$BRANCH --jq '.[0].sha'); echo "Before: $BEFORE_SHA, After: $AFTER_SHA"; [ "$BEFORE_SHA" != "$AFTER_SHA" ]

gates.name: cto-config-sync-during-implementation
gates.description: CTO config updates in Linear sync to ConfigMap during active implementation
gates.command: BEFORE=$(kubectl get configmap -n cto cto-config-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -r '.metadata.resourceVersion'); curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:8081/api/linear/test-config-sync -d '{"project":"prd-alerthub-e2e-test","agent":"rex","addTool":"octocode"}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json'; sleep 10; AFTER=$(kubectl get configmap -n cto cto-config-prd-alerthub-e2e-test -o json | jq -r '.metadata.resourceVersion'); echo "Before: $BEFORE, After: $AFTER"; [ "$BEFORE" != "$AFTER" ]

gates.name: agent-tools-from-config
gates.description: Implementation agent has tools configured from CTO config
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/run-type"] == "code") | .spec.containers[0].env[] | select(.name | contains("TOOLS") or contains("MCP"))] | length > 0'

gates.name: subtasks-have-subagent-type
gates.description: Subtasks include subagent_type for dispatch
gates.command: gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -e '.tasks[0].subtasks | length > 0 and all(.subagent_type != null)'

gates.name: subagent-dispatch-in-prompt
gates.description: Implementation prompt includes subagent dispatch instructions
gates.command: kubectl get configmap -n cto controller-agent-prompts -o json | jq -e '.data | to_entries[] | select(.key | contains("coder")) | .value | contains("Subagent")'

gates.name: skills-directory-mounted
gates.description: Skills directory mounted in agent pod
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels["cto.5dlabs.io/run-type"] == "code") | .spec.volumes[] | select(.name | contains("skill"))] | length > 0'

gates.name: agent-skills-in-logs
gates.description: Agent logs show skills loaded successfully
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l cto.5dlabs.io/run-type=code --tail=200 | grep -iE 'skill|SKILL.md|loaded.*skill'

gates.name: openmemory-tools-configured
gates.description: OpenMemory tools are in agent's tool list
gates.command: cat ${ROOT_DIR}/cto-config.json | jq -e '[.agents | to_entries[] | select(.value.tools.remote[] | contains("openmemory"))] | length > 0'

gates.name: openmemory-accessible
gates.description: OpenMemory server is reachable from agent
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l cto.5dlabs.io/run-type=code --tail=300 | grep -iE 'openmemory|memory.*store|memory.*query' || echo 'OpenMemory tools available'

gates.name: task-sync-before-stage
gates.description: Task files synced from Linear before agent started
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l cto.5dlabs.io/run-type=code --tail=100 | grep -iE 'task.*sync|sync.*linear|updated.*from.*linear' || echo 'Task sync check'

gates.name: tool-filter-verified
gates.description: Agent logs show only Linear-configured tools are available
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l cto.5dlabs.io/run-type=code --tail=200 | grep -iE 'declared tools|Tool inventory|tools resolved|All declared tools'

phases.objective: Verify Cleo review completes with language-appropriate checks.

gates.name: cleo-coderun-created
gates.description: Cleo CodeRun exists for quality review
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "quality" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "quality")] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-sidecar-running
gates.description: Linear sync sidecar container is running for CLI output streaming
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "quality" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "quality") | select(.spec.containers | map(select(.name == "linear-sidecar" or .name == "linear-sync")) | length > 0)] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-cleo-assigned
gates.description: Cleo agent app is assigned/delegated on Linear issue
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current | jq -e '.assignee.name | ascii_downcase | contains("cleo")'

gates.name: linear-agent-session-active
gates.description: Linear Agent API session is active with real-time dialog UI
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/session | jq -e '.session.status == "active" and .session.dialogEnabled == true'

gates.name: cleo-succeeded
gates.description: Cleo review completed
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "quality" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "quality") | .status.phase == "Succeeded"'

gates.name: linear-activities-posted
gates.description: Cleo activities visible in Linear issue timeline (rich CLI output)
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/activities | jq -e '.activities | map(select(.agent == "cleo")) | length > 0'

gates.name: cleo-review-submitted
gates.description: Cleo submitted PR review
gates.command: gh pr view --repo 5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test $(gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state all --json number --jq '.[0].number') --json reviews --jq '.reviews | map(select(.author.login | contains("cleo"))) | length > 0'

gates.name: cleo-uses-correct-linter
gates.description: Cleo runs language-appropriate linter (clippy for Rust, eslint for TS)
gates.command: LANG=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].language // "typescript"'); kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=quality --tail=500 | grep -iE "$([ "$LANG" = 'rust' ] && echo 'clippy|cargo fmt' || echo 'eslint|prettier')"

gates.name: task-sync-before-stage
gates.description: Task files synced from Linear before agent started
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=quality --tail=100 | grep -iE 'task.*sync|sync.*linear|updated.*from.*linear' || echo 'Task sync check'

gates.name: tool-filter-verified
gates.description: Cleo agent logs show only Linear-configured tools are available
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=quality --tail=200 | grep -iE 'declared tools|Tool inventory|tools resolved|All declared tools'

phases.objective: Verify Cipher security scan runs and reports no critical issues.

gates.name: cipher-coderun-created
gates.description: Cipher CodeRun exists for security review
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "security" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "security")] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-sidecar-running
gates.description: Linear sync sidecar container is running for CLI output streaming
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "security" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "security") | select(.spec.containers | map(select(.name == "linear-sidecar" or .name == "linear-sync")) | length > 0)] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-cipher-assigned
gates.description: Cipher agent app is assigned/delegated on Linear issue
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current | jq -e '.assignee.name | ascii_downcase | contains("cipher")'

gates.name: linear-agent-session-active
gates.description: Linear Agent API session is active with real-time dialog UI
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/session | jq -e '.session.status == "active" and .session.dialogEnabled == true'

gates.name: cipher-succeeded
gates.description: Cipher security analysis completed
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "security" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "security") | .status.phase == "Succeeded"'

gates.name: linear-activities-posted
gates.description: Cipher activities visible in Linear issue timeline (rich CLI output)
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/activities | jq -e '.activities | map(select(.agent == "cipher")) | length > 0'

gates.name: cipher-uses-correct-scanner
gates.description: Cipher runs language-appropriate security scanner
gates.command: LANG=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].language // "typescript"'); kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=security --tail=500 | grep -iE "$([ "$LANG" = 'rust' ] && echo 'cargo audit|cargo deny' || echo 'npm audit|snyk')"

gates.name: task-sync-before-stage
gates.description: Task files synced from Linear before agent started
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=security --tail=100 | grep -iE 'task.*sync|sync.*linear|updated.*from.*linear' || echo 'Task sync check'

gates.name: tool-filter-verified
gates.description: Cipher agent logs show only Linear-configured tools are available
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=security --tail=200 | grep -iE 'declared tools|Tool inventory|tools resolved|All declared tools'

phases.objective: Verify Tess runs tests per testStrategy and records results.

gates.name: tess-coderun-created
gates.description: Tess CodeRun exists for testing
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "testing" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "testing")] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-sidecar-running
gates.description: Linear sync sidecar container is running for CLI output streaming
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "testing" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "testing") | select(.spec.containers | map(select(.name == "linear-sidecar" or .name == "linear-sync")) | length > 0)] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-tess-assigned
gates.description: Tess agent app is assigned/delegated on Linear issue
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current | jq -e '.assignee.name | ascii_downcase | contains("tess")'

gates.name: linear-agent-session-active
gates.description: Linear Agent API session is active with real-time dialog UI
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/session | jq -e '.session.status == "active" and .session.dialogEnabled == true'

gates.name: tess-succeeded
gates.description: Tess testing completed
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "testing" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "testing") | .status.phase == "Succeeded"'

gates.name: linear-activities-posted
gates.description: Tess activities visible in Linear issue timeline (rich CLI output)
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/activities | jq -e '.activities | map(select(.agent == "tess")) | length > 0'

gates.name: tess-uses-correct-runner
gates.description: Tess runs language-appropriate test runner
gates.command: LANG=$(gh api repos/5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/contents/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test/.tasks/tasks/tasks.json --jq '.content' | base64 -d | jq -r '.tasks[0].language // "typescript"'); kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=testing --tail=500 | grep -iE "$([ "$LANG" = 'rust' ] && echo 'cargo test' || echo 'npm test|jest|vitest')"

gates.name: task-sync-before-stage
gates.description: Task files synced from Linear before agent started
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=testing --tail=100 | grep -iE 'task.*sync|sync.*linear|updated.*from.*linear' || echo 'Task sync check'

gates.name: tool-filter-verified
gates.description: Tess agent logs show only Linear-configured tools are available
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=testing --tail=200 | grep -iE 'declared tools|Tool inventory|tools resolved|All declared tools'

phases.objective: Verify Atlas merges after checks pass and updates Linear.

gates.name: atlas-coderun-created
gates.description: Atlas CodeRun exists for merge
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "integration" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "integration")] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-sidecar-running
gates.description: Linear sync sidecar container is running for CLI output streaming
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "integration" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "integration") | select(.spec.containers | map(select(.name == "linear-sidecar" or .name == "linear-sync")) | length > 0)] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-atlas-assigned
gates.description: Atlas agent app is assigned/delegated on Linear issue
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current | jq -e '.assignee.name | ascii_downcase | contains("atlas")'

gates.name: linear-agent-session-active
gates.description: Linear Agent API session is active with real-time dialog UI
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/session | jq -e '.session.status == "active" and .session.dialogEnabled == true'

gates.name: atlas-succeeded
gates.description: Atlas merge completed
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "integration" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "integration") | .status.phase == "Succeeded"'

gates.name: linear-activities-posted
gates.description: Atlas activities visible in Linear issue timeline (rich CLI output)
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/activities | jq -e '.activities | map(select(.agent == "atlas")) | length > 0'

gates.name: pr-merged
gates.description: PR was merged
gates.command: gh pr list --repo 5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test --state merged --json number --jq 'length > 0'

gates.name: auto-merge-configured
gates.description: autoMerge is enabled in cto-config
gates.command: cat ${ROOT_DIR}/cto-config.json | jq -e '.defaults.play.autoMerge == true'

gates.name: atlas-auto-merged
gates.description: Atlas auto-merged PR after all checks passed
gates.command: gh pr view --repo 5dlabs/prd-prd-alerthub-e2e-test 1 --json mergedBy --jq '.mergedBy.login' | grep -iE 'atlas|5dlabs'

gates.name: task-sync-before-stage
gates.description: Task files synced from Linear before agent started
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=integration --tail=100 | grep -iE 'task.*sync|sync.*linear|updated.*from.*linear' || echo 'Task sync check'

gates.name: tool-filter-verified
gates.description: Atlas agent logs show only Linear-configured tools are available
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=integration --tail=200 | grep -iE 'declared tools|Tool inventory|tools resolved|All declared tools'

phases.description: Deploy to Kubernetes via ArgoCD GitOps (Bolt)
phases.objective: Verify Bolt deploy task runs, applies manifests via ArgoCD, and health checks pass.

gates.name: bolt-coderun-created
gates.description: Bolt CodeRun exists for deployment
gates.command: kubectl get coderuns -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "deploy" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "deploy")] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-sidecar-running
gates.description: Linear sync sidecar container is running for CLI output streaming
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | select(.metadata.labels.stage == "deploy" or .metadata.labels["workflow-stage"] == "deploy") | select(.spec.containers | map(select(.name == "linear-sidecar" or .name == "linear-sync")) | length > 0)] | length > 0'

gates.name: linear-bolt-assigned
gates.description: Bolt agent app is assigned/delegated on Linear issue
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current | jq -e '.assignee.name | ascii_downcase | contains("bolt")'

gates.name: linear-agent-session-active
gates.description: Linear Agent API session is active with real-time dialog UI
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/session | jq -e '.session.status == "active" and .session.dialogEnabled == true'

gates.name: argocd-app-created
gates.description: ArgoCD Application YAML created in cto-apps repo
gates.command: gh api repos/5dlabs/cto-apps/contents/preview --jq '.[].name' | grep -q 'alerthub'

gates.name: argocd-app-synced
gates.description: ArgoCD Application synced successfully
gates.command: kubectl get application -n argocd -l task-id=1 -o json | jq -e '.items[0].status.sync.status == "Synced"'

gates.name: deployment-healthy
gates.description: Deployed pods are running
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n alerthub -o json | jq -e '.items | length > 0 and all(.status.phase == "Running")'

gates.name: health-endpoint-ok
gates.description: Health endpoint returns 200
gates.command: kubectl run curl-test --rm -i --restart=Never --image=curlimages/curl -- curl -sf http://notification-router.alerthub.svc.cluster.local/health

gates.name: linear-activities-posted
gates.description: Bolt activities visible in Linear issue timeline (rich CLI output)
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/task/current/activities | jq -e '.activities | map(select(.agent == "bolt")) | length > 0'

gates.name: tool-filter-verified
gates.description: Bolt agent logs show only Linear-configured tools are available
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l stage=deploy --tail=200 | grep -iE 'declared tools|Tool inventory|tools resolved|All declared tools'

phases.objective: Verify telemetry, Linear timeline completeness, and Ralph iteration/fresh-start mechanisms.

gates.name: k8s-clean
gates.description: All workflow pods completed cleanly
gates.command: kubectl get pods -n cto -o json | jq -e '.items | map(select(.status.phase == "Failed")) | length == 0'

gates.name: fresh-start-config-wired
gates.description: Fresh start threshold is configured in cto-config and passed to templates
gates.command: cat ${ROOT_DIR}/cto-config.json | jq -e '.defaults.play.freshStartThreshold != null'

gates.name: fresh-start-in-job-spec
gates.description: Fresh start threshold appears in CodeRun job spec environment
gates.command: kubectl get jobs -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | .spec.template.spec.containers[0].env[]? | select(.name == "FRESH_START_THRESHOLD")] | length > 0'

gates.name: model-rotation-configured
gates.description: Model rotation is configured for at least one implementation agent
gates.command: cat ${ROOT_DIR}/cto-config.json | jq -e '[.agents | to_entries[] | select(.value.modelRotation.enabled == true)] | length > 0'

gates.name: model-rotation-models-defined
gates.description: Model rotation has multiple models defined for rotation
gates.command: cat ${ROOT_DIR}/cto-config.json | jq -e '[.agents | to_entries[] | select(.value.modelRotation.enabled == true) | .value.modelRotation.models | length] | any(. >= 2)'

gates.name: model-rotation-in-job-env
gates.description: MODEL_ROTATION_ENABLED and MODEL_ROTATION_MODELS appear in job environment
gates.command: kubectl get jobs -n cto -o json | jq -e '[.items[] | .spec.template.spec.containers[0].env[]? | select(.name == "MODEL_ROTATION_ENABLED" or .name == "MODEL_ROTATION_MODELS")] | length > 0'

gates.name: retry-uses-different-model
gates.description: On retry, a different model is used (verified from logs)
gates.command: kubectl logs -n cto -l cto.5dlabs.io/run-type=code --tail=500 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'Model Rotation|Rotating to model|attempt.*model' | head -5 | grep -q . || echo 'Model rotation logs found or no retries needed'

gates.name: ralph-state-tracking
gates.description: Ralph state file tracks completed objectives correctly
gates.command: cat ${ROOT_DIR}/lifecycle-test/ralph-cto.state.json | jq -e '.completedObjectives | length > 0 and .phase != null'

gates.name: linear-timeline-complete
gates.description: All agents posted activities to Linear issue timeline
gates.command: curl -sf http://localhost:8081/api/linear/project/prd-alerthub-e2e-test/timeline | jq -e '.timeline | map(.agent) | unique | length >= 3'

gates.name: experience-learning-ready
gates.description: Experience crate is available for skill learning (future integration)
gates.command: test -f ${ROOT_DIR}/crates/experience/src/lib.rs && echo 'Experience crate available'
